approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized the capability registry after AGENT-LIVE-ANSWER-PREFLIGHT-GATE-001 shipped.
scopeSummary: Build a read-only Foundation capability registry contract/proof for agent identity, tools, source refs, read/write posture, model route, logging, approval boundaries, and fail-closed claims. No Harlan UI, runtime launch, live extraction, model/provider calls, or external writes.
notApproved: Do not build Harlan UI or feature work.
Do not launch live agent runtime work.
Do not call providers or models.
Do not send Gmail, ClickUp, Drive, Slack, or Agent Feedback mutations.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B or historical Meeting Vault cleanup.
Do not implement the reusable runtime template in this card.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
